blended.narrative: Wolf Creek is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,488 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 2.0" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 41".
